name: Pinglin Oolong
flavor_profile: Creamy and full-bodied with umami depth. Fresh character that quenches thirst — a pronounced huigan (returning sweetness) that lingers. Less floral than high-mountain Taiwanese oolongs, more savory and substantial.

brewing.tips: Longer first steep lets the tight ball-rolled leaves open. Second and third steeps drop shorter — the leaf is now fully unfurled and extracts faster.
